text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex — glad to have you with us as a moderator. Jump into #introductions, read the pinned guidelines, and ping the mod team if you need anything.
Welcome, mentor_lina — excited to have you as a mentor. Your experience will be valuable here; please share any onboarding tips with the team.
Welcome, guide_sam — thanks for joining as an event_helper. Check the onboarding notes in #welcome, and feel free to suggest ideas for upcoming events.
